sign_in.msg_intro: Enter your email below to sign in to your account

sign_up.msg_intro: Enter your information to create an account
sign_up.msg_email_privacy: We'll use this to contact you. We will not share your email with anyone else.
sign_up.msg_password_hint: Must be at least 8 characters long.
sign_up.err_pwd_mismatch: Passwords do not match. Please check and try again.

forgot_pwd.msg_instructions: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgot_pwd.msg_sent_after_send: If an account exists for {email}, we've sent a password reset link.

reset_pwd.msg_intro: Enter a new password for your account.
reset_pwd.err_pwd_mismatch: Passwords do not match. Please check and try again.
reset_pwd.msg_success_redirect: Password updated. Redirecting to sign in…
reset_pwd.msg_password_hint: Must be at least 8 characters long.

verify_success.title: Email verified successfully
verify_success.description: Your email has been verified. You can now return to your profile.

security.hint_oauth_set_password: You're signed in with GitHub or another provider. Setting a password lets you sign in with email and password as well.
security.err_change_password_same_as_old: The new password must be different from your current password.
security.err_change_password_too_short: The new password is too short.
security.err_change_password_too_long: The new password is too long.
security.err_change_password_no_credential: No password account is available to update.
security.msg_change_password_failed: Could not update your password. Please try again.
security.msg_sensitive_session_reauth: For your security, you need to sign in again. You are being taken to the sign-in page.
security.msg_set_password_success: Password saved. You can sign in with email and password.
security.msg_set_password_failed: Could not set password. Please try again.
security.msg_set_password_network_error: Network error or service unavailable. Check your connection and try again.
security.err_already_has_password: You already have a password. Use change password instead.
security.msg_accounts_load_hint: Refresh the page or try again later.
security.msg_link_failed: Failed to link GitHub account. Please try again.
security.msg_unlink_failed: Failed to unlink GitHub account. Please try again.
security.msg_unlink_success: GitHub account has been unlinked successfully.
security.unlink_confirm_desc: After unlinking, this GitHub account can no longer be used to sign in unless you link it again.
security.hint_cannot_unlink_last_key: For your account security, set a password or link another account before removing this connection.
security.msg_sessions_load_hint: Refresh the page or try again later.
security.msg_session_revoke_failed: Failed to revoke session. Please try again.
security.msg_sign_out_failed: Failed to sign out. Please try again.
security.sign_out_confirm_desc: You will be redirected to the sign-in page and need to authenticate again.
security.revoke_confirm_desc: This device will immediately lose access and must sign in again.
security.danger_delete_desc: Permanently remove your account and all associated data. This cannot be undone.

profile.avatar_upload_desc: Choose a PNG/JPG/WebP image. After upload it is cropped to about 200×200 in the cloud and saved as your profile picture.
profile.avatar_file_hint: Recommended: square image, up to 5MB, PNG/JPG/WebP.
profile.avatar_preview_placeholder: A preview appears here after you choose a file.
profile.avatar_delete_desc: This will remove your avatar and fallback to the default placeholder image.
profile.msg_avatar_signature_error: Could not get upload permission. Please try again later.
profile.msg_avatar_no_file: Please choose an image file first.
profile.profile_save_confirm_desc: Your display name will be updated for this account.
profile.msg_verify_email_sent: Verification email sent. Please check your inbox.
profile.msg_verify_email_error: Failed to send verification email. Please try again later.
profile.hint_change_email_disabled: Changing email will be supported in a future update.
